column1: product_Sale-madrona,Product,"Madrona Ct, Land/Home Package","The Dream Silver / DRM 481F built by Golden West Homes provides 1,296 square feet of thoughtfully arranged living space, featuring 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. This manufactured home is designed to enhance both comfort and functionality, with open areas perfect for gatherings and private bedrooms that offer a restful retreat. The DRM 481F is an excellent choice for families or individuals seeking a home that blends modern design with practical features, creating a welcoming environment for daily living.",866235_e86d2084e4a4444db265e5d471c12ae8~mv2.webp
column7:
866235_efaf738e110341549a4609d5ed878a37~mv2.webp,Land/Home Packages,,,0,,TRUE,PERCENT,0,InStock,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,"Tahuya, WA","

Nestled in the serene Maggie Lake community of Tahuya, WA, this 0.36-acre parcel at 80 NE Madrona Ct offers a unique opportunity for homebuyers seeking tranquility and natural beauty.

column1: A haven for outdoor enthusiasts and those seeking a peaceful lifestyle. Residents of Maggie Lake benefit from and enjoy exclusive access to Maggie Lake's community amenities, including a private beach, picnic areas, and a boat launch on the Hood Canal. Additionally the lot backs up to a greenbelt of aprox 42,000 acers of preserved forest land.

,The Home – Golden West Dream Silver 481F,

Paired with this prime lot is the Golden West Dream Silver 481F model, a 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home spanning 1,296 sq ft. This model is renowned for its quality craftsmanship and modern design, offering:
Spacious Living: Open-concept layout with ample natural light from the Mt Hood Dormer Windows
Modern Amenities: Energy-efficient appliances and contemporary finishes.

,,,,,,,,,,,,,
product_Sale-chester,Product,Chester Ave, Land/Home Package","The Dream Silver / DRM 301P built by Golden West Homes offers 756 square feet of efficiently designed living space, featuring 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. This manufactured home maximizes comfort within a compact footprint, with an open living area that enhances functionality and a private bedroom that provides a restful retreat. The DRM 301P is an ideal choice for individuals or couples seeking a cozy, modern home that blends practicality with style, making it perfect for those who appreciate efficient, comfortable living.",866235_3dc5ad990551468886c95420ab15ad70~mv2.webp
column5:
866235_56195466f45e4068b3042edd4786ca74~mv2.webp,Land/Home Packages,,,0,,TRUE,PERCENT,0,InStock,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,"Bremerton, WA","

🌲 The Land – 4,356 sq ft parcel in west Bremerton.

column1: Situated on a 4,356 sq ft parcel in West Bremerton with easy access to State St. and Burwell Gates. Approximately one mile to the Seattle ferry, shipyard, shopping, and dining. Prime location for commuters.

,The Home – Golden West Dream Silver 301P+,

– 2 Beds, 2 Bath, 756 sq ft Built by Golden West,

Dream Silver 301P model. Efficient and modern 756 sq ft layout featuring open-concept living, functional kitchen, private primary suite with attached bath, and second bedroom ideal for guests or office space.
Move-in ready. Great opportunity for low-maintenance living close to everything Bremerton has to offer.

The Duplex / 30×72 Duplex 3-2 x 3-2 built by Golden West Albany is a true duplex with two private homes under one roof. Totaling 2,160 square feet, this plan pairs a 3-bedroom, 2-bath residence on one side with a 3-bedroom, 2-bath residence on the other. Each side features a bright living room, dining area, and efficient kitchen, plus convenient storage. A shared wall keeps life quiet, while separate entries add privacy. Choose The 30×72 Duplex 3-2 x 3-2 for flexible living—tour today and see the possibilities.
